usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural test with no AI. All 6 phases passed: single-day summary+date round-trip, multi-day round-trip (3 days with distinct summaries and dates), summary-only and date-only partial metadata, empty-days truncation to zero items, and full replacement semantics (3-day overwritten by 2-day with no stale data). PR #198 day_summary/day_date JSONB metadata fix is verified end-to-end.
